key: Please wait, finishing the current reply…
en: Please wait, finishing the current reply…

en: What should we do with the image(s)? For two photos describe the composition (English is usually more stable)…

en: Photo (JPG, PNG, WebP) or document (TXT, MD, PDF)

key: Take a photo with the camera
en: Take a photo with the camera

key: Task is not available for this model
en: Task is not available for this model

key: File {name} is too large. Max 6 MB.
en: File {name} is too large. Max 6 MB.

key: Documents are not supported in this build.
en: Documents are not supported in this build.

key: File {name}: only JPG, PNG, WebP or TXT/MD/PDF.
en: File {name}: only JPG, PNG, WebP or TXT/MD/PDF.

key: File {name} is not supported. Only JPG, PNG and WebP.
en: File {name} is not supported. Only JPG, PNG and WebP.

key: Attach the main image first (Photo button). Second is optional.
en: Attach the main image first (Photo button). Second is optional.

key: Canvas cleared. Attach a new photo and describe the edit.
en: Canvas cleared. Attach a new photo and describe the edit.

key: Canvas cleared. Ready for new ideas! 🎨
en: Canvas cleared. Ready for new ideas! 🎨

key: Briefly: what is in the image…
en: Briefly: what is in the image…

key: Attachments are only available in chat with a multimodal model
en: Attachments are only available in chat with a multimodal model

en: Preparing… releasing GPU and starting description

key: Model returned no description text — see logs/lira.log
en: Model returned no description text — see logs/lira.log

key: Retry for {count} with English prefix / tags ({done}/{total})…
en: Retry for {count} with English prefix / tags ({done}/{total})…

key: {total} total: releasing GPU for batch description…
en: {total} total: releasing GPU for batch description…

key: Chat paused for now; faster than CPU
en: Chat paused for now; faster than CPU

key: Processed {done} of {total}: loading chat model again…
en: Processed {done} of {total}: loading chat model again…

key: Batch description on GPU starting soon…
en: Batch description on GPU starting soon…

key: {missing} gallery image(s) without description. Open Tools on the left and tap Add descriptions.
en: {missing} gallery image(s) without description. Open Tools on the left and tap Add descriptions.

key: −1 = all layers on GPU. Fewer layers use CPU, less VRAM, slower. Reload model after change.
en: −1 = all layers on GPU. Fewer layers use CPU, less VRAM, slower. Reload model after change.

key: Hardware cap at n_ctx={nCtx}: ~{hwCap} (reserve for reply + template).
en: Hardware cap at n_ctx={nCtx}: ~{hwCap} (reserve for reply + template).

key: Generate descriptions for frames without description
en: Generate descriptions for frames without description

key: Two instances cannot run on the same GPU.
en: Two instances cannot run on the same GPU.

key:
[Lira] Full session log (print, stderr, uncaught exceptions):
  {path}
en:
[Lira] Full session log (print, stderr, uncaught exceptions):
  {path}

[Lira] Qwen Image Edit log (load/edit stages, append):
  {path}
en:
[Lira] Qwen Image Edit log (load/edit stages, append):
  {path}

key: Wait for the chat reply to finish.
en: Wait for the chat reply to finish.

key: Wait for image generation to finish.
en: Wait for image generation to finish.

key: No empty or broken descriptions to fix.
en: No empty or broken descriptions to fix.

key: A multimodal vision model must be loaded (clip) — switch model in chat.
en: A multimodal vision model must be loaded (clip) — switch model in chat.

en: Descriptions done but could not restore chat model: {message}. Restart {app_name} or switch model in the menu.

key: File incomplete ({got} of {expected} bytes). Try again.
en: File incomplete ({got} of {expected} bytes). Try again.

key: PDF not converted to images for vision. In Lira2 venv run: pip install pymupdf
en: PDF not converted to images for vision. In Lira2 venv run: pip install pymupdf

key: Wait for gallery description refresh to finish.
en: Wait for gallery description refresh to finish.

key: Wait for the proactive notification to finish.
en: Wait for the proactive notification to finish.

key: 📎 Attach the main image (Photo button), then describe the edit in text.
en: 📎 Attach the main image (Photo button), then describe the edit in text.

key: Accepted Telegram message. Replying without tools — send again if you need more.
en: Accepted Telegram message. Replying without tools — send again if you need more.

key: ⏳ Wait for the current generation or edit to finish.
en: ⏳ Wait for the current generation or edit to finish.

key: Qwen Image Edit ready: main photo required, second optional for composition; then describe the edit.
en: Qwen Image Edit ready: main photo required, second optional for composition; then describe the edit.

en: {app_name} requests camera access to capture one frame for the vision model.

key: Review the frame before sending to chat.
en: Review the frame before sending to chat.

key: Qt Multimedia unavailable on this system.
en: Qt Multimedia unavailable on this system.

key:
Webcam not found.

If console showed «No QtMultimedia backends found» — remove forced QT_MEDIA_BACKEND=gstreamer and restart {app_name}, or install plugins:
  sudo apt install gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad
or set before launch: QT_MEDIA_BACKEND=ffmpeg
en:
Webcam not found.

If console showed «No QtMultimedia backends found» — remove forced QT_MEDIA_BACKEND=gstreamer and restart {app_name}, or install plugins:
  sudo apt install gstreamer1.0-plugins-good gstreamer1.0-plugins-bad
or set before launch: QT_MEDIA_BACKEND=ffmpeg

key: Wait for preview, then «Capture frame» (Qt QImageCapture).
en: Wait for preview, then «Capture frame» (Qt QImageCapture).

key: Camera not ready — wait a second…
en: Camera not ready — wait a second…

key: This is how {app_name} will see the frame. Confirm or retake.
en: This is how {app_name} will see the frame. Confirm or retake.

key: Wait for preview again and press «Capture frame».
en: Wait for preview again and press «Capture frame».

key: For PDF vision install: pip install pymupdf
en: For PDF vision install: pip install pymupdf

key: Install PDF support: pip install pypdf
en: Install PDF support: pip install pypdf

key: File does not look like a valid PDF (corrupt or truncated). Try again; limit 6 MB.
en: File does not look like a valid PDF (corrupt or truncated). Try again; limit 6 MB.

key: [PDF has no extractable text — may be scans only; attach pages as JPG/PNG.]
en: [PDF has no extractable text — may be scans only; attach pages as JPG/PNG.]

key: Format «{name}» not supported. Text: .txt, .md, .csv; PDF: .pdf; images: JPG, PNG, WebP.
en: Format «{name}» not supported. Text: .txt, .md, .csv; PDF: .pdf; images: JPG, PNG, WebP.
